The PR removes Feishu streaming-card suffix extraction and updates streaming-card tests so CardKit content update bodies carry cumulative visible markdown.

PR surface: Source -14, Tests 0. Total -14 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source reproduction: current main and v2026.6.1 compute suffix-only Feishu CardKit update content and tests assert suffix bodies. No live Feishu tenant reproduction was established in this read-only review.

target.title: fix(feishu): preserve streaming card content
target.body:
## Summary

- Fix Feishu streaming-card updates so CardKit receives cumulative visible markdown instead of suffix-only content.
- Update Feishu streaming regression tests for throttled, natural-boundary, failed-update, and non-OK retry paths to assert cumulative request bodies.
- Scope: Feishu streaming CardKit content updates only; no config/default changes and no non-streaming Feishu delivery changes.

Fixes #90164

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu streaming-card update calls should preserve the cumulative reply text in the CardKit content element. On latest `origin/main`, when the visible text is `hello` and the next streamed snapshot is `hello!`, the local boundary proof captures the outgoing CardKit update body as suffix-only `content: "!"`; on the patched PR head, the same `FeishuStreamingSession.update()` path captures cumulative `content: "hello!"`.

Real environment tested: Local Linux detached worktree at latest `origin/main` (`c768a9e6ca`) and local Linux patched PR head (`d87c6c3ed4`), both running the real `extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.ts` `FeishuStreamingSession.update()` path through the Feishu Vitest project. The proof mocked only `fetchWithSsrFGuard` at the HTTP boundary to capture the outgoing CardKit request body; no live Feishu tenant credentials were used.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
env -C /home/0668001029/openclaw-worktrees/issue-90164-main-proof EXPECTED_CARDKIT_CONTENT="!" node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.proof.test.ts --reporter=verbose --silent=false
env -C /home/0668001029/openclaw-worktrees/issue-90164 EXPECTED_CARDKIT_CONTENT="hello!" node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.proof.test.ts --reporter=verbose --silent=false
env -C /home/0668001029/openclaw-worktrees/issue-90164 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts
env -C /home/0668001029/openclaw-worktrees/issue-90164 corepack pnpm@11.2.2 exec oxlint extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.ts extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.test.ts
env -C /home/0668001029/openclaw-worktrees/issue-90164 git diff --check
env -C /home/0668001029/openclaw-worktrees/issue-90164 corepack pnpm@11.2.2 tsgo:extensions
env -C /home/0668001029/openclaw-worktrees/issue-90164 corepack pnpm@11.2.2 check:test-types
```

Evidence after fix:
```text
BEGIN LATEST_ORIGIN_MAIN c768a9e6ca
stdout | extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.proof.test.ts > Feishu streaming proof > prints the CardKit streaming update content
CARDKIT_UPDATE_CONTENT=!
CARDKIT_UPDATE_BODY={"content":"!","sequence":2,"uuid":"s_card_proof_2"}

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed (1)
END LATEST_ORIGIN_MAIN c768a9e6ca

BEGIN PATCHED_PR_HEAD d87c6c3ed4
stdout | extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.proof.test.ts > Feishu streaming proof > prints the CardKit streaming update content
CARDKIT_UPDATE_CONTENT=hello!
CARDKIT_UPDATE_BODY={"content":"hello!","sequence":2,"uuid":"s_card_proof_2"}

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed (1)
END PATCHED_PR_HEAD d87c6c3ed4

BEGIN PATCHED_REGRESSION_TESTS d87c6c3ed4
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.extension-feishu.config.ts
RUN  v4.1.7 /home/0668001029/openclaw-worktrees/issue-90164
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  94 passed (94)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 25.33s
END PATCHED_REGRESSION_TESTS d87c6c3ed4

BEGIN PATCHED_STATIC_CHECKS d87c6c3ed4
oxlint extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.ts extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.test.ts: pass
git diff --check: pass
tsgo:extensions: pass
check:test-types: pass
END PATCHED_STATIC_CHECKS d87c6c3ed4
```

Observed result after fix: The same local CardKit boundary path that emitted suffix-only `content: "!"` on latest `origin/main` now emits cumulative `content: "hello!"` on the patched head, and the committed Feishu streaming tests assert cumulative content for throttled updates, natural-boundary updates, and failed/non-OK retry updates.

What was not tested: No live Feishu/Lark tenant was used, so this proof does not confirm the external service UI rendering with real credentials; it verifies the local Feishu CardKit request body at the HTTP boundary where the overwrite-causing payload was built.

## Regression Test Plan

- Coverage level: Feishu extension regression tests plus extension/test type checks.
- Target test files: `extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.test.ts` and `extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`.
- Scenario locked in: streaming card updates now send cumulative `content` in the CardKit content update body for throttled flushes, natural boundaries, failed update retries, and non-OK update retries.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: the tests exercise the real `FeishuStreamingSession.update()` request-body construction immediately before the CardKit HTTP boundary.

## Root Cause

- Root cause: `FeishuStreamingSession.update()` and the final incremental close path converted cumulative stream text into a suffix before calling the CardKit content update endpoint, so an update-style CardKit request could overwrite the element with only the latest chunk.
- Missing detection / guardrail: the Feishu streaming-card tests previously asserted suffix-only request bodies, so the last-character overwrite shape was locked in as expected behavior instead of being rejected.
target.author: mushuiyu886
